name: Beef and French Fries
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour 6 tablespoons of the oil into a flat skillet, add the potatoes and fry until brown. Drain the oil and set potatoes aside to drain on paper towels.
2. Fry the onion and garlic in oil, then add the beef and fry for about 1 minute or until meat is browned but not tough.
3. Mix the cornstarch, water, sugar, and fish sauce in a small bowl, blending well. Add this mixture to the beef and stir. Add more water if needed to make a light sauce that is not too thick.
4. Fold in the potatoes or remove the potatoes to a serving dish and spoon the beef and sauce over the potatoes.
5. If you like, sprinkle with lots of black pepper.
